task_completion.description: Navigate to the Socioboard login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost and displays the Socioboard login screen.
The email 'admin@socioboard.local' is visible in the email/username input field on the login form.

task_completion.description: Successfully log into the Socioboard account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Socioboard main dashboard or logged-in home interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the account settings or profile page to change the password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The account settings, profile, or security page is open, displaying the fields required to change the user password.

task_completion.description: Change the account password to the new specified password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message/toast indicating the password was successfully updated, or the password change form actively being submitted with the new password.

task_completion.description: Create the required confirmation file with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a command executing (e.g., echo 'Password changed successfully' > /tmp/password_change_done.txt) or a text editor saving the exact text to the /tmp/password_change_done.txt file.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to interact with Socioboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Socioboard is accessed via a standard GUI web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) rather than through terminal curl/requests commands.

integrity.description: The password change was performed through the application's user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The password change happens within the Socioboard web settings UI, not via direct database manipulation or backend script execution.

integrity.description: The confirmation file was genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the command was actually executed (the prompt returned), or a text editor shows the file was saved to the correct path, rather than just being typed out in an unsaved draft.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Socioboard login URL is http://localhost. The user email is 'admin@socioboard.local' and the old password is 'Admin2024!'. The new password must be 'SecureBoard#2025!'. The confirmation file must be created at '/tmp/password_change_done.txt' containing exactly the text 'Password changed successfully'.
